description: CompositionGrey/brown top made of stretchy 100% viscose, has long sleeves, a cowl neck and brand tag at hemFitRegularWash careWash at 30 degrees with similar colours inside outPull into shape after washingDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanIron lowA great casual wear option from s.oliver. The slouchy cowl neck of this long sleeve top frames your neck and face for a flattering look while the soft viscose fabric has a light shimmer meaning you'll look great without sacrificing comfort.Model statisticsThe product is a size 38 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
